channel.title: Frontion News - Tier 1 Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇮🇱⚔️🇮🇷 Israel launches airstrikes on Iran after missile fire, marking 100th day of war
item.description: Israel struck targets in central and western Iran early Monday in response to missile attacks from Tehran. A missile from Yemen also targeted Israel as the conflict threatens to reignite.

item.title: 💵📈 Dollar climbs to two-month peak as Fed rate hike bets ramp up
item.description: The US dollar reached a two-month high after a strong jobs report sent traders increasing bets on a Federal Reserve rate hike this year, while the yen weakened further toward intervention territory.

item.title: 🇨🇳📦 China exports set for strong May on front-loaded orders and chip demand
item.description: China's export growth likely strengthened in May as overseas orders were brought forward to pre-empt energy price pressures from the Gulf war, alongside sustained global demand for semiconductors and AI components.

item.title: 💥 Israel Hits Iranian Targets Despite Trump Warning to Netanyahu
item.description: Israel struck military targets in western and central Iran despite U.S. President Donald Trump reportedly telling Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to refrain from further attacks. Trump stated Netanyahu would have to accept any US-Iran deal.

item.title: ⚠️ Tsunami Alerts Across Asia After Philippines Quake, Evacuations Underway
item.description: Tsunami warnings were issued for Indonesia, the Philippines, and Japan after a powerful earthquake off Mindanao. Officials warned of possible waves over one meter as coastal communities evacuated to higher ground.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇪🇺 Zelensky and European Leaders Set Five Conditions for Just Peace With Russia
item.description: Ukraines president met with UK, French, and German leaders in London to outline five conditions for a just and lasting peace with Russia. The talks come amid reports Zelensky is willing to freeze current battle lines to end the war.

item.title: 🚀⚔️🇮🇷 IRGC Claims Israel Used Air-Launched Ballistic Missiles in Iran Attack
item.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps stated that Israel employed air-launched ballistic missiles to strike targets inside Iran, marking a significant escalation in military capabilities used in the conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇩 Indonesian Political Heavyweights Position as Prabowo Falters
item.description: Indonesia's next presidential election is not until 2029, but political heavyweights are already maneuvering for position amid signs of weakness in the current administration.

item.title: 🇰🇭💰 Cambodia Crackdowns Fail to Stop Growing Scam Centers: Amnesty
item.description: Amnesty International identified 86 scam compounds operating across Cambodia as of April 2026, up from 53 a year earlier, saying government crackdowns are merely performative.

item.title: 🇵🇭 Philippines Verifying at Least Five Deaths After 7.8 Magnitude Quake
item.description: Authorities are confirming casualties in General Santos city after a powerful 7.8 earthquake struck off Mindanao island, triggering tsunami warnings across the Pacific region.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇰🇵 Xi Jinping Visits North Korea for First Time in Seven Years to Strengthen Ties
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping arrives in Pyongyang on Monday for a rare summit with Kim Jong Un, seeking to reinforce strategic ties amid North Korea's deepening partnership with Russia and stalled nuclear talks.

item.title: 🇦🇲 Pashinyan Declares Victory in Armenia Election, Cementing Westward Shift
item.description: Armenian Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan declared victory in parliamentary elections, with early results showing a commanding lead. The outcome would cement Armenia's pivot away from Russian influence toward Europe.

item.title: 🛢️ OPEC+ Approves Fourth Oil Output Hike Since Hormuz Closure
item.description: OPEC+ agreed to raise oil production targets by 188,000 barrels per day for July, the fourth increase since the Strait of Hormuz closed due to the US-Iran conflict. The move is largely symbolic given continued supply constraints.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇪🇺 European Leaders Support Ukraine Ceasefire Talks, Bolster Missile Defenses
item.description: British PM Starmer hosted Zelensky, Macron, and Merz to discuss ceasefire negotiations with Russia. The leaders emphasized urgent need to strengthen Ukraine's ballistic missile defenses.

item.title: 🇰🇷📉 South Korea Halts Trading as KOSPI Plunges Over 8% in Tech-Led Selloff
item.description: South Korea activated a circuit breaker after the benchmark KOSPI index plunged more than 8%, forcing a temporary trading halt. The dramatic selloff comes as investors retreat from AI and tech stocks amid global market jitters.

item.title: 🇯🇵🎖️ Japan Ground Self-Defense Force Holds Live-Fire Exercises With 3,000 Troops
item.description: Japan's Ground Self-Defense Force conducted annual live-fire exercises near Mount Fuji with 3,000 troops participating, showcasing military readiness amid regional tensions.

item.title: 🇵🇭🌊 Philippines Hit by 7.8 Magnitude Earthquake, Tsunami Warnings Issued
item.description: A powerful 7.8 magnitude earthquake struck off Mindanao in the southern Philippines, triggering tsunami warnings for the Philippines, Indonesia, Taiwan, and other Pacific islands. The German Research Centre for Geosciences (GFZ) reported the quake struck at a shallow depth.

item.title: 🇯🇵📉 Japan Economy Loses Momentum in Q1 as Capital Expenditure Slumps
item.description: Japan's economy lost momentum in the January-March quarter as sluggish capital expenditure pointed to challenges ahead from the Middle East conflict. Revised GDP data showed annualized growth of 1.8%, below initial estimates, as the Iran war impact weighs on the export-dependent economy.

item.title: 🛢️💰 Oil Prices Jump More Than $2 on Israel Strikes in Lebanon
item.description: Oil prices surged more than $2 per barrel after Israel struck Beirut, with US crude futures hitting $93.11. The escalation threatens the fragile ceasefire between Iran and the US, keeping markets on edge amid ongoing Hormuz Strait disruptions.

item.title: 🇮🇷⚔️ Iran threatens US targets after Lebanon escalation
item.description: Iran's top negotiator warned that US bases and Israeli assets in the Middle East are legitimate targets following a US naval blockade of Iran and Israel's escalation in Lebanon.

item.title: 🇵🇪🗳️ Peru presidential runoff too close to call
item.description: Exit polls show Peru's presidential election runoff in a statistical tie as voters choose between competing visions for the country's future amid political turmoil.

item.title: 🇺🇸🎖️ US troops and families adjust to new normal of Iran war
item.description: The prolonged state of readiness in the US-Iran conflict is causing significant stress for service members and their families as the war reaches its 100th day.

item.title: 📉🇦🇪 Gulf markets fall amid fresh US-Iran escalation
item.description: Most Gulf stock markets closed lower on Sunday after new escalations clouded efforts to end the war between the US and Iran, adding to regional economic uncertainty.

item.title: ⚽🇮🇷 Iran World Cup team arrives in Mexico amid US tensions
item.description: Iran's World Cup squad arrived in Tijuana for the tournament as US-Iran tensions remain high. Several support staff were denied US visas while players received theirs.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇮🇱 Iran Fires Missiles at Israel, Violating Ceasefire Agreement
item.description: Iran launched ballistic missiles at Israel for the first time since the April ceasefire, marking a major escalation. Israel's military confirmed the attack, while Iran's state broadcaster acknowledged the strikes.
